name: Stateful Deep Research
description: A high-performance deep research tool with hierarchical memory, adaptive compression, and conflict resolution.

searchResults.description: Web search results (JSON or text) from MCP web_search for the initial query

followUps.description: JSON array of follow-up search results, each with query and searchResults fields. Used in round-2+ of multi-round research.

input.hint: Maximum number of sources to process

examples.prompt: Search the web for: What are the current best warehouse management systems for logistics companies?
examples.call: {"researchQuery": "What are the current best warehouse management systems for logistics companies?"}

examples.prompt: Produce a research report for: What are the current best warehouse management systems for logistics companies? Results from web search: [{"title":"G2 top WMS","url":"https://www.g2.com/...","snippet":"Manhattan Associates, Oracle NetSuite WMS, and SAP EWM are top contenders"}]
examples.call: {"researchQuery": "What are the current best warehouse management systems for logistics companies?", "searchResults": "{\"title\":\"G2 top WMS\", \"url\":\"https://www.g2.com/...\", \"snippet\":\"Manhattan Associates, Oracle NetSuite WMS, and SAP EWM are top contenders\"}"}
